payload.title: Creating & Publishing Message Templates
payload.query_preview: How do I send templates after the 24-hour WhatsApp window expires?

payload.title: Goals in Bot Studio
payload.query_preview: How do I set up a journey in Journey Builder using Send Message, Wait for Event, Condition Node, and Goal Node?

payload.title: Agent Assist Settings
payload.query_preview: A customer has their own app with a third-party chat widget and a third-party AI bot. At certain events they want to hand over the same chat to a live agent using Gupshup Agent Assist. How can this be done? What is the documented approach for bot-to-agent handover, assignment rules, and any relevant integration pattern?

payload.title: Agent Assist Analytics & Reports
payload.query_preview: Does the documentation describe a way to use Agent Assist with a third-party widget or external AI bot? Is there a documented API or integration pattern to bring chats from an external app into Agent Assist and then route them to live agents?

payload.title: Agent Assist Settings
payload.query_preview: Agent Assist third party widget external AI bot handover external assignment rule custom integration bring chats from external app into Agent Assist
